examples: We are reminded just how small and how impermanent we are.
Oral communication is fast-moving and impermanent.
Gudo smiled. 'Everything in this life is impermanent' he explained.
Because crisis manifests itself intermittently, we treat it as an impermanent or transient phenomenon.
More recently, Facebook has stapled on new features to its messaging app, like calling, voice mail and impermanent texts.
